name: Agent 2 — Flight Booking | وكيل حجز الطيران

parameters.url: =https://api.amadeus.com/v2/shopping/flight-offers?originLocationCode={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.origin }}&destinationLocationCode={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.destination }}&departureDate={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.depart_date }}&adults={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.passengers }}&max=5

=https://api.tequila.kiwi.com/v2/search?fly_from={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.origin }}&fly_to={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.destination }}&date_from={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.depart_date }}&date_to={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.depart_date }}&adults={{ $('Extract Flight Request').item.json.passengers }}&limit=5
